description: List of contributors and payments in which some entries comprise both a name and a sum, whereas others have names only. Dating; probably 12th century. Names include: al-Rayyis; Thiqat al-Mulk; Abū l-Munā al-Ṭabīb; Abū l-Faḍl Ibn al-Baṣrī and his children; Abū Saʿīd; Abū l-Ḥasan Daniʾel and his brother; Abū l-Makārim b. Baqāʾ and his brother; [...] Barakāt; Abū Saʿd b. ʿUmayr; Abū l-Ḥasan b. Ghulayb Kohen; Abū ʿAlī his partner; Abū l-Aʿlā Mesos; Abū ʿAlī b. Abū Saʿīd; Abū Saʿd b. Ṭībān; Abū l-Aʿlā b. Tamām Ṭabīb; Abū ʿAlī Ibn al-Karnīb(?); Abū Surūr b. Yeshuʿa Kohen; Abū Mūsā Hārūn and his brother; Abū l-Khayr al-Zariz(?). Same scribe as T-S AS 185.303 (PGPID 22561). (Information in part from Goitein's index card.)
description_he: רשימת תורמים ותשלומים. כנראה מהמאה ה-12. שמות: אל-ראייס, תקת אל-מולק, אבו אל-מונא הרופא, אבו אל-פדל אבן אל-בצרי וילדיו, אבו סעיד, אבו אל-חסן דניאל ואחיו, ועוד.
